channel.title: Halborn — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Halborn (halborn).

item.title: CVE-2023-33242 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Lindell17 TSS Abort Mishandling
item.description: Crypto wallets implementing the Lindell17 TSS protocol might allow an attacker to extract the full ECDSA private key by exfiltrating a single bit in every signature attempt (256 in total) because of not adhering to the paper's security proof's assump…

item.title: CVE-2023-33241 · 9.6 CRITICAL — GG18 / GG20 TSS Beta Parameter Vulnerability
item.description: Crypto wallets implementing the GG18 or GG20 TSS protocol might allow an attacker to extract a full ECDSA private key by injecting a malicious pallier key and cheating in the range proof. Depending on the Beta parameters chosen in the protocol implem…

item.title: CVE-2023-30769 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Rab13s Exploit
item.description: Vulnerability discovered is related to the peer-to-peer (p2p) communications, attackers can craft consensus messages, send it to individual nodes and take them offline. An attacker can crawl the network peers using getaddr message and attack the unpa…
